australian_relation: ABC public article with a distinct named spirit claim at Willow Court in New Norfolk, Tasmania.
coordinate_evidence_note: ABC page names Willow Court in New Norfolk and describes spirit claims at the site; coordinates use the state-checked OSM/Nominatim Willow Court Historic Site point.
evidence_summary: ABC reported on a global seance at Willow Court in New Norfolk. Ghost hunter Emma Percey said Willow Court was home to several spirits connected to objects and areas at the site, including a spirit named Sarah attached to the abortion chair, which she said had been verified by three psychic mediums.
location_text: Willow Court Historic Site, New Norfolk, TAS
publication_or_organisation: Ghost hunters conduct global seance via Facebook at Australia's oldest mental hospital; ABC News Tasmania
title: Sarah in Willow Court Sarah spirit
